name: The Walking Dead | S1
description:
This is based off of Season One of the walking dead. Basically the same as the other one except I've added short descriptions of the characters.

I wasn't sure which characters to add since theres so many, so I went with the ones before Rick and his group are on the farm. Rick, Daryl, Glenn, Andrea, Carol, Shane, Lori, T-dog, Dale. Also Merle, but he's on his own since he disappears really early on.

Sorry there's kind of a lot of tokens. I tried to keep all the character's descriptions short.

CW: possible gore and death, it's a zombie apocalypse.

A virus has spread rapidly across the globe. It has caused societal collapse, resulting in the end of modern civilization. Cities and highly congested areas suffered the worst in the beginning, quickly becoming overrun. The military tried to contain the virus by bombing some cities, but it didn't work.

Please leave reviews and let me know if there's anything I should change/add!
creator: Lifelong_Fatigue
